citations.description: Content present here (agent-skills), not at the AC-specified claude-skills path

findings.criterion: `examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains a new subsection instructing the agent to read `docs/plan-review-gate.md` and `docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md` before recording tickets.
findings.detail: The path `examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md` does not exist in the repository. The `examples/` directory only contains `agent-skills/`, not `claude-skills/`. The substantively equivalent content is present at `examples/agent-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md` lines 124–137, but the exact file path specified by AC1 is absent. This ticket (db8c) is open and duplicates closed ticket c681; the work was filed under c681 at a path that has since been renamed.

citations.description: No git diff tooling available; codebase file tools cannot verify which files changed relative to origin/main

findings.criterion: The change is docs-only: `git diff --stat origin/main` shows only that one SKILL.md file changed.
findings.detail: This criterion requires verifying a git diff at runtime. It is not tagged [operator-attested], so codebase evidence is required, but the codebase tools do not expose git diff output. No concrete codebase evidence can be gathered to confirm or deny this criterion.

citations.description: Ticket db8c status is 'open'; Gerrit attestation is in a comment on duplicate ticket c681-b7c5-d44d-495b, not on this ticket

findings.criterion: The change lands on `main` through Gerrit with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 (submitted).
findings.detail: This criterion is not tagged [operator-attested] and requires Gerrit vote/submission evidence that is external to the codebase. The ticket comment on the duplicate (c681) mentions commit 1f3a61c4c and Change-Id I350f3154266b580c6d444044add1e26886a49b21, but those attestations are on the duplicate ticket (c681), not this ticket (db8c), and this ticket remains open. No codebase-verifiable evidence demonstrates this criterion is met for this ticket.
findings.remediation: Record a concrete attestation on THIS ticket (db8c) as a ticket comment naming the Gerrit Change-Id or URL, the LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 scores, and the submission timestamp. Alternatively, close this ticket as a duplicate of c681 without requiring its own independent Gerrit submission.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
